reviews.review_text: Stayed one night but should have stayed longer. As soon as we got there we were blown away with the view from our cabin. Could not fault the park in any way

This review is for the kiosk as I didn't stay in the caravan park.
I am very impressed with the friendly service given to me when I popped in for a milkshake.
The kiosk is well stocked and the prices reasonable. They also have a lovely deck area overlooking the bay.
If I come by this way again, I wouldn't hesitate to stay a bit longer and soak up more of this relaxing, friendly and welcoming town 😊.

Sites were spacious enough for our tinny beside the awning.  If you like your fishing this is place to be. Fish cleaning facilities right in camp. Good vibes and great local knowledge from the regulars and reasonably priced. Clean amenities and a nice quiet camp. Fabulous location near the water and the boat ramp is just to the side of the park to launch from the beach. Water pressure is not great, however just use your pump and keep filling tanks up. A washdown point would be handy in Town to clean up after your stay. Will be back for a little longer next time. Thanks for a great Stay!

The Venus Bay Caravan Park is a fantastic place to relax and unwind. The town is small and simple, with just the caravan park and a general store that covers all the essentials like food, alcohol, and petrol.

The caravan park itself also serves some really nice short-order meals, which is a great bonus after a day out.

The location is absolute beachfront, and we were lucky enough to get a front-row site with a beautiful ocean view. If you enjoy fishing, this place is a paradise. Many caravanners head out early each morning in their aluminium boats and return happy, often with a good catch of whiting. There’s also a long jetty within walking distance, perfect for fishing off the land.

The only minor downside is the water pressure. It appears the park uses desalinated water, so it can be quite low and only trickle through at times. Not a big issue though—just fill your tank and use your own pump.

Overall, a great experience. It really feels like living on a deserted island. Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Loved this place
Owners where great
Had some cracking fish 'n' chips the night we got there

Will be back 100%

We just finished a loop of the eyre peninsula and the starfish cabin was by far one of the best accommodations on the eyre peninsula. The signs are right, venus bay is the place to be for peace and tranquillity
Very small caravan park Popular with small boat owners so dingys parked as well as cars and vans.
Great place to stop staff are excellent and the cafe has great burgers and fish and chips

Great caravan park.
Friendly staff. Old but clean amenities.
Funky style camp kitchen with  BBQs
Right on the beach too

Fantastic location right on the beachfront – you can’t beat it! The staff were all friendly and welcoming, which made our stay even better.

Love that it’s a real one-stop shop. The takeaway counter serves great food at great prices with plenty of variety, and the serving sizes are generous. The convenience store is well stocked and also very reasonably priced, especially considering the location.

Would definitely stay again!

Never ceases to impress. Service at the Park was second to none. Happy, friendly, professional. Room was immaculate. Food, delicious and value for money. Not our first visit and certainly not our last.
5 stars for the lovely man cleaning the amenities. Kindness goes a long way & he is very nice to let me and toddler in while closed.

The site was maintained to a high standard and the amenities were spotlessly clean. I was given a beach front pitch and the views were spectacular. Thank you for this! Staff at the site were friendly and welcoming. As a solo traveller I felt safe and relaxed. Enjoyed the cliff top walk and the views blew me away literally. Thank you for a lovely stay.

Great location .Shop sells great ,very reasonably priced  food .I've had hot dogs ,fish and chips ,a hamburger .All excellent and a fabulous seating deck out the back .Great staff .My go to for lunch .Other place in town is really really expensive .
Lovely little campground to stay at. Peaceful and good sized sites. Lovely view. We thought the man at reception was friendly and helpful.
WOW!!

Very peaceful, clean amenities nice owners.
Little grocery shop, pub. Serves food. The park shop sells hot food, and other stuff. Closest pub for meals about 15km. Prawn boats come in and sell prawns fresh from boat on occasion.
I stayed in one of the Gar cabins, which had everything I needed. The reception staff were lovely, and the park was in a great location; it was very clean, tidy, and peaceful.

Good caravan park.
Roomy sites overlooking the water.
Good clean facilities, low water pressure.
Camp kitchen available for use.
Walking distance to license general store.
Shop at park has food available for purchase.
Can hire boats to use.
Magic very quite a pitty about the wind

We found this a very welcoming park. Fun and successful fishing off jetty and catching so many whiting from a boat hired from the park. Visitors were friendly and happy to share their days fishing escapades. Recommend.
Excellent location, great facilities and the staff are amazing.|Don't forget to have the Seafood Basket, its to die for|Thanks team, see you again in 2026

Jill and Paul were amazing they went out of their way to look after us wonderful hosts
Food was amazing
Thank you  11/11/25
Great spot.

Wie haben über BookingCom gebucht... Die Kommunikation und der CheckIn waren mangelhaft.
Das Office schließt um 18.30 womit auch ein Check In hinfällig ist. Weder per E-Mail noch per Tel war jedenfalls erreichbar.
Anderer Gäste, die regelmäßig dort sind, kamen dann auf die Idee, das ein Schlüssel hinterlegt ist. Nach 2 Std herumirren konnten wir dann endlich in die "Villa" 🫣

Wo fangen irreführende Informationen an ?
Das gelbe Haus und die entsprechenden Wohnräume waren mit der Vielzahl aller Bilder präsent. Irgendwo dazwischen dann "unsere" Villa....

Very clean park, good facilities, right on the beach, staff and other people were very friendly, Dogs allowed, we stayed on a powered site, the issue was the water pressure, but its fine if you use the toilets and showers in the park. Will definitely be back.

We stayed here in a Starfish cabin for 4 nights to attend a function in the nearby Port Kenny. The weather was unusually overcast and windy for this time of the year, yet nothing could detract from this idealistic location and awesome accommodation. The cabin was extremely well provisioned with a comfortable bed, sparkly clean and efficient shower with everything provided. The kitchen facilities lacked nothing with plenty of cupboard space for our pantry items. This cabin was very reasonably priced and ideal for two. We were literally on the beach. The park employees were all so friendly and helpful.
A big congratulations to the proprietors. We highly recommend this venue for your next stay.

3 night stay in the park
Managed 6 squid 1 afternoon
Hamburgers and steak sandwiches are the best
Great park, plenty of fishing close by. Good scenery, recommend park boat hire and local fishing knowledge. Good lookouts of ocean
Awesome spot to camp
We stayed in a Starfish cabin. From the moment we opened the door to a clean cabin that was warm, we enjoyed the view, and walks. Our stay was relaxing.
Calming and peaceful place to stay.  Maybe busy in the summer.

Have just spent 5 amazing nights at this amazing park.  I think we had the best site in the park for our caravan - overlooking the beautiful bay and jetty.   The staff were so helpful, letting us extend our stay.  The amenities were always spotlessly clean.   The fish and chips were excellent, from the reception.

Had a wonderful relaxing stay. The cabin was  basically new , heaps of room , everything was in very good condition and right on the water . Perfect spot to go if you want peace and a really relaxing time

Park is close to beach with two walking access points and fish cleaning station in the park. Everything you need for a stop over including takeaways if you don't want to cook. Park has its own desalination plant so fresh water can be sourced if staying at the park. Lots of fisherman type people staying here. Park surface is mostly sandy soil. Laundry with 3 working machines and 1 dryer but plenty of line space. Staff are friendly and helpful.

We had a 1 night stay in a Starfish cabin. Couldn't fault the accommodation. Fabulous view over the bay. Newly fitted out very clean and neat little touches.
The headland walk is amazing.
No phone reception, WiFi and TV, and all sullage/grey water has to run all over the sites as no drainage
Great location
Had a caravan site. Lovely spot, overlooking water. Staff members, and food were lovely.  Will be back
Good fisherman's caravan park.

Cabins are advertised as "beach front views"
But all the caravan parking is in front of the cabins.
Seems its better to not pay for the cabin and get an unpowered site.
Somehow that is rewarded, not the people paying hundreds to stay a night.
Good to know for next time, bring your own caravan so you dont spend your holiday staring at someone else's
Caravan Park is tight to manoeuvre around. Has small sites.
Not enough water pressure need to fill water tank and use own pump to shower
Beautiful area and great fishing. Still only $38 a night for a site
Great place to stay and have a fish. Clean amenities block. Staff are helpful. Will stay here again.
Park was lovely, neat and quiet and we loved every bit of our stay. The staff were awesome too. We truly hope to be able to come back again.
The best cooked fish and chips for miles around

We camp and I'm not even sure if there are cabins but the beach is right there, and for those who fish, so is the boat ramp. The park itself fits in plenty without seeming crowded - every site is powered and honestly, would return.
What a place. Couldn't beleive it when we rolled onto our site. Water views.  Secure park, great rates. Right in the heart of town.
WHat a great place and the staff running super friendly and helpful , very clean and organised , highly recommend
Still here just booked another 7days 10 àll up best camp site I've been at this is number 13 g'day parks I've been 👍❤️
Compared to other Caravan Parks it it very tight and dusty

We used to come here every year for the past 7 or 8 years. My wife passed, and here I am again back. Many fond memories of great times. You don't get that at places that just don't pass on the vibe. Great service, great everything.
Yep, it's the vibe. Pretty good fishing as well.
Cheers.

Convenient.
Water pressure was very low but we were able to fill our own tanks, slowly.
The grey water drain was a buried 1" pipe that we had to dig up. It was without a fitting which made it difficult to connect our hose.
Very friendly flies in their thousands.
Such a nice place, dont let the gravel sites put you off. Beachside sites, fish & chips and burgers at kiosk, great camp kitchen and facilities A+ guys!
Awesome little caravan Park on the beach, highly recommended

Beautifully situated caravan park away from the hustle and bustle. Quiet and peaceful. The views are lovely, the park is run by very friendly helpful management and staff.
Food is fantastic also especially the hamburgers I had and well priced.
It is easy to see why many return here, not to mention it's ideal for fishermen and the local pelicans.
Visit the nearby Talia caves whilst here they are stunning...go during low tide though!
Quite peaceful
This caravan park is situated right on the bay, very pretty, amenities older but clean.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Venus Bay, and it was an absolutely wonderful experience. The location is unbeatable, situated right in front of the beach, which allows for stunning views and easy access to the shore. The accommodation offered complete privacy, making it a perfect retreat for those looking to escape the hustle and bustle of daily life. Every aspect of the stay was catered to ensure comfort and convenience, making it a truly memorable getaway. I highly recommend Venus Bay to anyone looking for a serene and private beachfront stay. It's a gem that promises relaxation and beauty in equal measure!

What a gem. Absolute beach front. Quite location. Nice walks. Amenities clean. Quite low water pressure but still got a good shower. We found sites were good size, although as it was not busy we drove through. Lovely, helpful people. Office also had some takeaways. If I was a fisherman I might have never left!
Right on the beach, it was great.

This is a slice of paradise you just don't want to leave,  the amenities  are well maintained and clean.  The staff here are friendly and very helpful, makes the stay even better.  Waking up and looking at the water is just worth the effort to get here. We are in a caravan,  but the cabins look great as well

One of the best place we stayed.
Cabin was really clean and its perfect for couple.

Clean 10/10
Location 10/10
Service 10/10
Hopefully we can come again ❤️
Great little oasis for a break or as most people there... Fishing!!  Great area to explore. The bay is amazing and the cliffs stunning
I recommend staying here

The staff was really friendly and keen for a little chat.
The food was also really tasty!
And do not forget to visit the pelicans on your stay there

Nice little coastal caravan park. Much like the rest of the western Eyre Peninsula caravan parks. Yes, the sites are a bit tight, and water pressure is poor, but you just fill your tanks up and turn your pumps on. Toilet & shower amenities are clean and tidy. $4 for a washing machine. Beach front sites, walking distance to the jetty, licenced general store, and boat ramp. Venus Bay is a very small and simple town, but we enjoyed making it our vase to explore for two nights. We did day trips to elliston, talia caves, colton bakery, and Baird bay/point labatt sealion colony.
Very good place I would highly recommend
Its a bit cramped for my liking. Nice place though. Feed from reception/shop was excellent. Only one night stop. Feels like a sheep pen.
A perfect place to injoy live going back
Really enjoyed our stay here. Location overlooking water with lots of Birdlife around.
One if the best parks I've stayed in. Cabin on the beach. From the time I walked in until I left, it was lovely. The staff were more than helpful and happy. Thankyou again.

Very disappointed. Allocated a site on the right side in second row. Crammed in to tiny site with awning almost touching next doors van. Felt like we were in a cave the vans in front and side were so close. Not even a glimpse of the water. Staff said “no” when asked to move. No grey water drainage. Next doors grey water under our van. Unless you can get a premium water site on the left side  I wouldn’t stay here.

We are fultime travellers Touring Oz In Style and  been travelling for sometime now. We were only meant to pass through the town of Venus Bay but we fell In love with the town. We were lucky enough to scored a premium waterfront powered site and wow what a site it was with stunning views. We loved the park so much we ended up extending. Thanks to the lovely reception ladies for accommodating us. The park is very well looked after and the staff are all very welcoming.
Venus Bay is now on the top of our list of best places we have stayed in SA. 👌
We will definitely be back. Thanks for such a great stay.. 👍

Clean, empty caravan park (not for long though) at a brilliant location.
Love Venus Bay.
One of the most scenic places in Australia

Great bit of paradise, we are almost on the beach.
Office sells awesome fishermans baskets.
It is located in a beautiful place.
Thank you for a great stay your units are very good and very clean boat hire was very good and the service was sensational thanks so much 10x10
Lovely spot beach front good for fishing if you have a small dingy
One of the best all round parks I been to in this area. Food at reception was first class. Views and seawater outstanding. Loved the close up of two fishing trawlers at jetty.
Such a gorgeous location with absolute beachfront.
First time ever in my life I've been to Venus Bay. A very quite little sea side town. Very beautiful clean and very friendly people.
Good value cabin with a terrific view
Camped on the grounds overnight. Amenities are beautifully maintained and clean, right on the waterfront for fishing. Highly recommend this park for overnight stays or longer for tents and vans.
Here now for the 3rd time. Love it!!
This is a great place. We stay a nite. The staff were great.toilet are very clean and so are the showers.  $32. With own caravan.  There a few  spots to park the caravan.  Worth a nite or 2.
Older amenities but very clean and tidy. Located in a great spot for everything aquatic - ideall for fishing orientated folk.

Simply the BEST !!....we always try and stay here..

I CANNOT STRESS JUST HOW GOOD IT IS !!
Was ok but that is it, get told to put the van in one place, and first thing this morning oh your in the wrong place moved the bloody van twice more, leaving tomorrow morning cant wait..
